page_metadata.biotools__summary: Given a new dataset with time-to-event outcomes and baseline covariates, the AutoScore-Survival package provides a pipeline of functions to split data and implement the six modules to generate the final scores that require minimal manipulation from users.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Given a new dataset with time-to-event outcomes and baseline covariates, the AutoScore-Survival package provides a pipeline of functions to split data and implement the six modules to generate the final scores that require minimal manipulation from users.
